notes: Single-treated-unit CFT-2021 prediction intervals (scdata, not scdataMulti). Two specs captured: cointegrated_data=False (levels) and =True (first differences, the tutorial's setting). mlsynth's VanillaSC(inference='scpi', scpi_cointegrated=...) reproduces both CI_all_gaussian bands to Monte-Carlo error (width mean diff ~0.04 coint / ~0.10 levels at 2000 sims) and the simplex weights to 4 dp. scpi is GPL, mlsynth MIT: numbers recorded once, no run-time scpi dependency in the benchmark.
